scripts.dev:electron: npm run build:electron && concurrently "vite --port=3000 --host=0.0.0.0" "wait-on http://localhost:3000 && electron ."
scripts.build:electron: esbuild ui/electron-main/main.ts --outfile=dist-electron/main.js --platform=node --format=esm --external:electron --external:path --external:fs --bundle && esbuild ui/electron-main/hardware/gpuAccel.ts --outfile=dist-electron/hardware/gpuAccel.js --platform=node --format=esm --bundle && esbuild ui/electron-main/ipc/handlers.ts --outfile=dist-electron/ipc/handlers.js --platform=node --format=esm --external:electron --external:axios --bundle
